text.title: AI Status Digest Pipeline Output Contract
text.summary: JSON-schema output contract every AI Status Digest Pipeline application must satisfy. Required fields, forbidden patterns, allowed transformations, plus a valid and an invalid worked example.

section.title: Output schema (JSON Schema draft-07)

required.field: Stable slug used to reference this artefact downstream.
Single named accountable owner (handle / email / role).
The chosen value, ranking, or verdict produced by this run.
≥2 sentences citing at least one input artefact by name.
List of input artefact names with source paths or URLs.
ISO-8601 date the artefact was last validated.

forbidden.pattern: rationale that does not reference any input by name
inputs_used is empty AND decision is not 'no-op'
duplicate artefact_id within the same store
last_reviewed older than 90 days without a refresh note

allowed-transformations.transformation: Trim rationale to ≤500 chars while preserving numeric claims and named tools.
Promote a 'no decision yet' state to status='pending' rather than fabricating a decision.
Order arrays deterministically by natural key (slug / id) before serialising.

example.note: Required fields populated; forbidden_seen empty; owner is a single named handle.
Missing artefact_id and forbidden_seen non-empty — schema rejects both.

list.item: All required fields present and non-null.
